title: Turbine Generator T-402 Operating Specifications
content: Turbine Generator T-402 has a maximum operating pressure limit of 150 PSI. The maximum allowable oil temperature is 95 degrees Celsius. If casing vibration exceeds a threshold of 0.15 inches per second (ips), shut down the unit immediately.

title: Turbine Generator T-402 Emergency Isolation Procedure
content: To isolate Turbine Generator T-402: First, shut off the main fuel line valve. Second, close isolation valve B on the lube-oil header. Finally, engage the manual mechanical lock on the drive shaft before starting any casing inspections.

title: Water Pump P-101 Casing & Flow Specifications
content: Water Pump P-101 is rated for a maximum flow rate of 500 GPM (Gallons Per Minute) at a maximum speed of 1800 RPM. The maximum casing pressure rating is 250 PSI. Do not operate below 50 GPM to prevent pump cavitation.

title: Water Pump P-101 Shutdown & Isolation steps
content: Water Pump P-101 isolation procedure: 1. Turn off the main electrical breaker located in Substation 3. 2. Close the suction gate valve completely. 3. Close the discharge check valve to prevent backward water flow.

title: Main Isolation Valve V-99 Maintenance Standards
content: Main Isolation Valve V-99 is a full-bore gate valve with Class 300 body rating and a Viton O-ring seal. During quarterly maintenance, inspect the valve packing for leaks, torque actuator bolts to 45 ft-lbs, and lubricate the stem threads.

title: Emergency Generator GEN-501 General Specifications
content: Emergency Generator GEN-501 provides 500kW of backup power. It operates on low-sulfur diesel fuel, has a coolant capacity of 25 gallons, and utilizes a 24V DC battery starter system. Normal oil pressure range is 40 to 60 PSI.

title: Emergency Generator GEN-501 Maintenance checklist
content: Emergency Generator GEN-501 weekly checklist: Verify fuel level in auxiliary tank is above 50%. Test battery starter voltage (must exceed 24V DC). Check for oil leaks on housing and clean the air filter.

title: Steam Boiler BOILER-3 Operating Specifications
content: Steam Boiler BOILER-3 operates at a normal steam pressure of 15 PSI with a capacity of 1000 lbs/hr. The normal water level setpoint is 50% on the sight glass. High-pressure steam limit is set at 25 PSI.
